# clickstack_webhook (Resource)

Manages a ClickStack webhook.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "clickstack_webhook" "slack_alerts" {
  name        = "Slack Alerts"
  service     = "slack"
  url         = var.slack_webhook_url
  description = "Send alerts to the #ops-alerts Slack channel"
}

variable "slack_webhook_url" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the webhook.
- `service` (String) The service type (e.g., slack, generic).
- `url` (String, Sensitive) The webhook URL.

### Optional

- `body` (String) Custom request body template.
- `description` (String) A description of the webhook.
- `headers` (Map of String) Custom headers to include in webhook requests.
- `query_params` (Map of String) Query parameters to include in webhook requests.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the webhook.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
